name_en: In Stock 22. Innovation never disappoints. By integrating power and elegant design aesthetics into the original beauty, the Chanel Gabrielle bag was born. It first appeared at the 2017 Spring/Summer Haute Couture show, and its silhouette has been everywhere at the recent fashion week. The delicate and soft body and the hard and structured bottom fully embody Mademoiselle Chanel's pursuit of freedom and comfort. Size 20cm
